updateNote: Day 80 (5:08 AM PDT May 18): Trump rejects Iran reparations demand as 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE'; posts 'Clock is Ticking' Truth Social ultimatum; NSC Situation Room meeting May 19 with Vance, Rubio, Hegseth, Caine, Ratcliffe.
